allow: PowerShell($bin = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Pub\\Cache\\bin"; Write-Output "BIN DIR: $bin"; if \(Test-Path $bin\) { Get-ChildItem $bin | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($bin = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Pub\\Cache\\bin"; $items = Get-ChildItem -Path $bin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Count: $\($items.Count\)"; $items | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Name })

PowerShell($kt = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin\\keytool.exe"; $ks = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.android\\debug.keystore"; if \(Test-Path $ks\) { & $kt -list -v -keystore $ks -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android | Select-String "SHA1:|SHA256:" } else { Write-Output "debug.keystore NOT FOUND — run 'flutter build apk --debug' once to create it" })

PowerShell($img = "C:\\Users\\Nou\\Desktop\\annie-kaydee\\subtitle_app\\assets\\icon\\watermark_logo.png"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $b = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($img\); Write-Output "watermark_logo.png = $\($b.Width\) x $\($b.Height\) px"; $b.Dispose\(\))
